name: @cryptoart/auctionhouse-subgraph
description: The Graph subgraph for indexing Creator Core and Auctionhouse events (Base + Ethereum mainnet)

scripts.deploy:base: graph deploy --studio --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --network base --network-file networks.json cryptoart-auctionhouse
scripts.deploy:mainnet: graph deploy --studio --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --network mainnet --network-file networks.json cryptoart-auctionhouse-ethereum
